subject: Payout pending
description: My weekly seller payout has been pending for four days.

subject: Weekend payout
resolution: Explained that payout processing runs on business days only.

subject: Change bank account
description: How do I change the bank account before the next payout?
resolution: Updated bank details and applied a 48-hour security hold.

subject: Negative balance
description: Why was my payout reduced after a customer refund?
resolution: Explained that refunds and chargebacks are deducted from the next payout.

subject: Minimum payout
description: Will a balance of 8 dollars be paid this week?
resolution: Explained the 20-dollar minimum and balance rollover.

subject: International payout fee
description: What fee applies to my EUR payout?
resolution: Confirmed a 1 percent conversion fee for non-base-currency payouts.

subject: Missing payout email
description: I was paid but did not receive the payout statement.
resolution: Regenerated the statement and corrected the billing email.

subject: Tax hold
description: Why is my December payout blocked?
resolution: Requested missing tax identity information before release.
